{{Quote|On the Baroonda track it was a busy day for the salvage droids, which scoured two square kilometers collecting Podracer pieces belonging to the late Turbo McMerrit.|From the ''[[Fode and Beed Show/Legends|Fode and Beed Show]]''|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
The '''P-100 salvage droid''', also known as the '''maintenance spider droid''', was a small [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]], produced by [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]], in operation during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:ITW1_Salvage_droid_holding_arm.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A [[salvage droid holding arm]] deploying P-100s.]]
The P-100 was a multi-armed salvage droid commonly deployed from the underside of a [[Salvage droid holding arm|large transport craft]]. They were largely used to retrieve scrap parts from crash sites on [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] courses. They had an overpowered [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift engine]] so they could pick up heavy loads. Once the P-100 droids were reloaded into the holding arm, it would return to the main podrace arena to drop off collected parts. If an owner did not claim their parts within two hours they would either be auctioned or sold, often to [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />

==History==
In addition to scavenging, these droids were used for other jobs, such as package delivery and search-and-rescue. Several thousand were outfitted with low power [[Stun blaster/Legends|stun blasters]] and let loose on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to deal with a [[Stratt/Legends|stratt]] infestation.<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />

Smaller variants of this model were used for the transport of luggage and other small cargo on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Episode I]]'' incorrectly attributes the "P-100" designation to the [[salvage droid holding arm]].
